arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.
transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِاسْمِكَ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
translation: O Allah, in Your name I die and I live.
transliteration: Allahumma bismika amutu wa ahya.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَسْلَمْتُ نَفْسِي إِلَيْكَ، وَوَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِي إِلَيْكَ، وَفَوَّضْتُ أَمْرِي إِلَيْكَ، وَأَلْجَأْتُ ظَهْرِي إِلَيْكَ، رَغْبَةً وَرَهْبَةً إِلَيْكَ، لَا مَلْجَأَ وَلَا مَنْجَا مِنْكَ إِلَّا إِلَيْكَ، آمَنْتُ بِكِتَابِكَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَ وَبِنَبِيِّكَ الَّذِي أَرْسَلْتَ
translation: O Allah, I have submitted my soul to You. I have turned my face to You. I have entrusted my affair to You. I have leaned my back upon You, out of desire and fear of You. There is no refuge and no escape from You except to You. I believe in Your Book which You revealed and in Your Prophet whom You sent.
transliteration: Allahumma aslamtu nafsi ilayk, wa wajjahtu wajhi ilayk, wa fawwadtu amri ilayk, wa alja'tu zahri ilayk, raghbatan wa rahbatan ilayk. La malja'a wa la manja minka illa ilayk. Amantu bi kitabikal-ladhi anzalta wa bi Nabiyyikal-ladhi arsalt.
virtue: من قالها ثم مات مات على الفطرة

arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا وَكَفَانَا وَآوَانَا، فَكَمْ مِمَّنْ لَا كَافِيَ لَهُ وَلَا مُؤْوِيَ
translation: All praise is for Allah who has fed us and given us drink and sufficed us and sheltered us. For how many are there who have no one to suffice them and no one to shelter them.
transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi at'amana wa saqana wa kafana wa awana. Fakam mimman la kafiya lahu wa la mu'wi.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ قِنِي عَذَابَكَ يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ عِبَادَكَ
translation: O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the Day You resurrect Your servants.
transliteration: Allahumma qini 'adhabaka yawma tab'athu 'ibadak.

arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
translation: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after He gave us death. And to Him is the resurrection.
transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur.

arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ، رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي
translation: There is no god but Allah, alone without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and to Him belongs all praise. And He is over all things omnipotent. Glory is to Allah and all praise is for Allah. And there is no god but Allah. And Allah is the Greatest. And there is no power and no strength except by Allah, the Most High, the Most Great. My Lord, forgive me.
transliteration: La ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa Huwa 'ala kulli shay'in Qadir. Subhanal-lahi walhamdulillah wa la ilaha illal-lahu wallahu Akbar, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahil-'Aliyyil-'Azim. Rabbighfir li.

arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي فِي جَسَدِي، وَرَدَّ عَلَيَّ رُوحِي، وَأَذِنَ لِي بِذِكْرِهِ
translation: All praise is for Allah who has restored my body to me and returned my soul to me and permitted me to remember Him.
transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi 'afani fi jasadi, wa radda 'alayya ruhi, wa adhina li bi dhikrih.

arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَىٰ اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
translation: In the name of Allah we enter. In the name of Allah we exit. And upon Allah our Lord we rely.
transliteration: Bismil-lahi walajna, wa bismil-lahi kharajna, wa 'alal-lahi Rabbina tawakkalna.

arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَىٰ اللَّهِ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
translation: In the name of Allah. I rely upon Allah. And there is no power and no strength except by Allah.
transliteration: Bismil-lah, tawakkaltu 'alal-lah, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
translation: O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy.
transliteration: Allahummaftah li abwaba rahmatik.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
translation: O Allah, I ask You from Your bounty.
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik.

arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
translation: In the name of Allah.
transliteration: Bismillah.

arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَٰذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
translation: All praise is for Allah who has fed me this and provided it for me without any effort or strength from me.
transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi at'amani hadha wa razaqanihi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah.

arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْدًا كَثِيرًا طَيِّبًا مُبَارَكًا فِيهِ، غَيْرَ مَكْفِيٍّ وَلَا مُوَدَّعٍ وَلَا مُسْتَغْنًى عَنْهُ رَبَّنَا
translation: All praise is for Allah, abundant praise, pure and blessed. Not sufficient, nor can we dispense with it, nor can we do without it, our Lord.
transliteration: Alhamdulillahi hamdan kathiran tayyiban mubarakan fih, ghayra makfiyyin wa la muwadda'in wa la mustaghnan 'anhu Rabbana.

arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ فِي أَوَّلِهِ وَآخِرِهِ
translation: In the name of Allah at its beginning and its end.
transliteration: Bismil-lahi fi awwalihi wa akhirihi.

arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي سَقَانَا عَذْبًا فُرَاتًا بِرَحْمَتِهِ
translation: All praise is for Allah who has given us sweet, fresh water to drink by His mercy.
transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi saqana 'adhdhan furatan bi rahmatih.

arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي كَسَانِي هَٰذَا الثَّوْبَ وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
translation: All praise is for Allah who has clothed me with this garment and provided it for me without any effort or strength from me.
transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi kasani hadhath-thawba wa razaqanihi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِهِ وَخَيْرِ مَا هُوَ لَهُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهِ وَشَرِّ مَا هُوَ لَهُ
translation: O Allah, I ask You for the good of it and the good of what it is for. And I seek refuge in You from the evil of it and the evil of what it is for.
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min khayrihi wa khayri ma huwa lah, wa a'udhu bika min sharrihi wa sharri ma huwa lah.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَٰذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَىٰ، وَمِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضَىٰ
translation: O Allah, we ask You in this journey of ours for righteousness and piety, and for deeds that please You.
transliteration: Allahumma inna nas'aluka fi safarina hadhal-birra wat-taqwa, wa minal-'amali ma tarda.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اطْوِ لَنَا بُعْدَهُ، وَهَوِّنْ عَلَيْنَا شَقَّهُ
translation: O Allah, fold up for us its distance. And make easy for us its hardship.
transliteration: Allahummat-wi lana bu'dahu, wa hawwin 'alayna shaqqah.

arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
translation: Glory is to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could not have otherwise subdued it. And indeed, to our Lord we will surely return.
transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin, wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqalibun.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
translation: O Allah, a beneficial rain.
transliteration: Allahumma sayyiban nafi'an.

arabic: مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ
translation: We have been given rain by the grace and mercy of Allah.
transliteration: Mutirna bi fadlil-lahi wa rahmatih.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا
translation: O Allah, there is nothing easy except what You make easy. And You make the difficult easy if You will.
transliteration: Allahumma la sahla illa ma ja'altahu sahla, wa Anta taj'alul-hazna idha shi'ta sahla.

arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
translation: Allah is sufficient for us and He is the best Disposer of affairs.
transliteration: Hasbunal-lahu wa ni'mal-wakil.

arabic: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنْفُسَنَا وَإِنْ لَمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
translation: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves. And if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers.
transliteration: Rabbana zalamna anfusana wa in lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna lanakunanna minal-khasirin.

arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَوْمَ يَقُومُ الْحِسَابُ
translation: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and the believers on the Day the account is established.
transliteration: Rabbighfir li wa liwalidayya wa lilmu'minina yawma yaqumul-hisab.

arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
translation: Our Lord, give us in this world good and in the Hereafter good. And protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina 'adhaban-nar.

arabic: رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي مُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةِ وَمِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِي ۚ رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَاءِ
translation: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and from my descendants. Our Lord, and accept my supplication.
transliteration: Rabbij-'alni muqimas-salati wa min dhurriyyati. Rabbana wa taqabbal du'a'.

arabic: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.
transliteration: Rabbi zidni 'ilma.

arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي
translation: My Lord, expand for me my chest. And ease for me my affair.
transliteration: Rabbishrah li sadri wa yassir li amri.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَىٰ وَالتُّقَىٰ وَالْعَفَافَ وَالْغِنَىٰ
translation: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and self-sufficiency.
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-huda wat-tuqa wal-'afafa wal-ghina.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ، وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ
translation: O Allah, I seek the good from You by Your knowledge. And I seek ability from You by Your power. And I ask You from Your great bounty.
transliteration: Allahumma inni astakhiruka bi 'ilmik, wa astaqdiruka bi qudratik, wa as'aluka min fadlikal-'azim.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ، أَذْهِبِ الْبَاسَ، اشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي، لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ، شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
translation: O Allah, Lord of mankind. Remove the affliction. Heal, for You are the Healer. There is no healing except Your healing. A healing that leaves no illness behind.
transliteration: Allahumma Rabban-nas, adhhibil-ba's, ishf Antash-Shafi, la shifa'a illa shifa'uk, shifa'an la yughadiru saqama.

arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ (ثَلَاثًا)، أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ وَأُحَاذِرُ (سَبْعَ مِرَارٍ)
translation: In the name of Allah (three times). I seek refuge in Allah and His power from the evil of what I feel and what I fear (seven times).
transliteration: Bismillah (three times). A'udhu billahi wa qudratihi min sharri ma ajidu wa uhadhir (seven times).

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ، ابْنُ عَبْدِكَ، ابْنُ أَمَتِكَ، نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ، مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ، عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ
translation: O Allah, I am Your servant, son of Your servant, son of Your female servant. My forelock is in Your hand. Your command over me is forever executed. Your decree over me is just.
transliteration: Allahumma inni 'abduk, ibnu 'abdik, ibnu amatik, nasiyati bi yadik, madin fiyya hukmuk, 'adlun fiyya qada'uk.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have made lawful instead of what You have made unlawful. And make me free of need from all but You by Your bounty.
transliteration: Allahumma kfini bi halalika 'an haramik, wa aghnini bi fadlika 'amman siwak.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ انْفَعْنِي بِمَا عَلَّمْتَنِي، وَعَلِّمْنِي مَا يَنْفَعُنِي، وَزِدْنِي عِلْمًا
translation: O Allah, benefit me with what You have taught me. And teach me what will benefit me. And increase me in knowledge.
transliteration: Allahummanfa'ni bima 'allamtani, wa 'allimni ma yanfa'uni, wa zidni 'ilma.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوَالِ نِعْمَتِكَ، وَتَحَوُّلِ عَافِيَتِكَ، وَفُجَاءَةِ نِقْمَتِكَ، وَجَمِيعِ سَخَطِكَ
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the removal of Your blessing. From the transformation of Your well-being. From the suddenness of Your punishment. And from all Your displeasure.
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min zawali ni'matik, wa tahawwuli 'afiyatik, wa fuja'ati niqmatik, wa jami'i sakhatik.

arabic: رَبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
translation: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they raised me when I was small.
transliteration: Rabbirhamhuma kama rabbayani saghira.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَىٰ ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
translation: O Allah, help me to remember You, to thank You, and to worship You in the best manner.
transliteration: Allahumma a'inni 'ala dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni 'ibadatik.

arabic: يَا مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوبِ ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلَىٰ دِينِكَ
translation: O Turner of hearts, make my heart firm upon Your religion.
transliteration: Ya Muqallibal-qulub, thabbit qalbi 'ala dinik.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا
translation: O Allah, there is nothing easy except what You make easy.
transliteration: Allahumma la sahla illa ma ja'altahu sahla.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الصَّبْرَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
translation: O Allah, I ask You for patience and well-being in this world and the Hereafter.
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukas-sabra wal-'afiyata fid-dunya wal-akhirah.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِي مَنْ هَدَيْتَ
translation: O Allah, guide me among those You have guided.
transliteration: Allahummah-dini fi man hadayt.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيمَا رَزَقْتَنَا
translation: O Allah, bless for us what You have provided us.
transliteration: Allahumma barik lana fima razaqtana.

arabic: رَبَّنَا وَسِعْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ رَحْمَةً وَعِلْمًا فَاغْفِرْ لِلَّذِينَ تَابُوا وَاتَّبَعُوا سَبِيلَكَ وَقِهِمْ عَذَابَ الْجَحِيمِ
translation: Our Lord, You have encompassed all things in mercy and knowledge. So forgive those who have repented and followed Your way. And protect them from the punishment of Hellfire.
transliteration: Rabbana wasi'ta kulla shay'in rahmatan wa 'ilman faghfir lilladhina tabu wattaba'u sabilak wa qihim 'adhabal-jahim.

arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
translation: Our Lord, accept from us. Indeed, You are the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
transliteration: Rabbana taqabbal minna, innaka Antas-Sami'ul-'Alim.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِي قَلْبِي نُورًا، وَفِي لِسَانِي نُورًا، وَفِي سَمْعِي نُورًا، وَفِي بَصَرِي نُورًا
translation: O Allah, place light in my heart. And light in my tongue. And light in my hearing. And light in my sight.
transliteration: Allahummaj-'al fi qalbi nura, wa fi lisani nura, wa fi sam'i nura, wa fi basari nura.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَحْسِنْ عَاقِبَتَنَا فِي الْأُمُورِ كُلِّهَا، وَأَجِرْنَا مِنْ خِزْيِ الدُّنْيَا وَعَذَابِ الْآخِرَةِ
translation: O Allah, make good our final outcome in all matters. And protect us from the disgrace of this world and the punishment of the Hereafter.
transliteration: Allahumma ahsin 'aqibatana fil-umuri kulliha, wa ajirna min khizyid-dunya wa 'adhabil-akhirah.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
translation: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise. And I seek refuge in You from the Fire.
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-Jannata wa a'udhu bika minan-Nar.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ
translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have made lawful instead of what You have made unlawful.
transliteration: Allahumma kfini bi halalika 'an haramik.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا قُوَّةَ لِي إِلَّا بِكَ
translation: O Allah, I have no strength except through You.
transliteration: Allahumma la quwwata li illa bik.

arabic: لَا تَقْنَطُوا مِنْ رَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ
translation: Do not despair of the mercy of Allah.
transliteration: La taqnatu min rahmatil-lah.

arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ
translation: My Lord, grant me wisdom. And join me with the righteous.
transliteration: Rabbi hab li hukman wa alhiqni bis-salihin.

arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
translation: I seek forgiveness from Allah and I repent to Him.
transliteration: Astaghfirullaha wa atubu ilayh.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ حُبَّكَ وَحُبَّ مَنْ يُحِبُّكَ
translation: O Allah, I ask You for Your love and the love of those who love You.
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka hubbaka wa hubba man yuhibbuk.

arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
translation: Our Lord, grant us from among our wives and offspring comfort to our eyes. And make us an example for the righteous.
transliteration: Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa dhurriyyatina qurrata a'yunin waj'alna lilmuttaqina imama.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اشْفِنِي شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
translation: O Allah, heal me with a healing that leaves no illness behind.
transliteration: Allahummash-fini shifa'an la yughadiru saqama.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ
translation: O Allah, You are Peace and from You is peace.
transliteration: Allahumma Antas-Salam wa minkas-salam.

arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
translation: Allah is sufficient for us and He is the best Disposer of affairs.
transliteration: Hasbunal-lahu wa ni'mal-wakil.

arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
translation: I seek refuge in Allah from Satan, the accursed.
transliteration: A'udhu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajim.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَصْبَحَ بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ
translation: O Allah, whatever blessing I or any of Your creation have received this morning is from You alone, without partner.
transliteration: Allahumma ma asbaha bi min ni'matin aw bi ahadin min khalqika faminka wahdaka la sharika lak.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَمْسَى بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ
translation: O Allah, whatever blessing I or any of Your creation have received this evening is from You alone, without partner.
transliteration: Allahumma ma amsa bi min ni'matin aw bi ahadin min khalqika faminka wahdaka la sharika lak.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِ قَوْمِي فَإِنَّهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
translation: O Allah, guide my people for they do not know.
transliteration: Allahummah-di qawmi fa innahum la ya'lamun.

arabic: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ، اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي
translation: Indeed we belong to Allah and indeed to Him we will return. O Allah, reward me in my calamity.
transliteration: Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un. Allahumma'jurni fi musibati.

arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي فِي جَسَدِي
translation: All praise is for Allah who has granted me health in my body.
transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi 'afani fi jasadi.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا، وَاجْعَلْ لِي فِي هَٰذَا الْأَمْرِ فَرَجًا وَمَخْرَجًا
translation: O Allah, there is nothing easy except what You make easy. And make for me in this matter relief and a way out.
transliteration: Allahumma la sahla illa ma ja'altahu sahla, waj'al li fi hadhal-amri farajan wa makhraja.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, goodly provision, and acceptable deeds.
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an wa rizqan tayyiban wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا وَشَرِّ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ
translation: O Allah, I ask You for the good of her and the good of the nature You have created her with. And I seek refuge in You from the evil of her and the evil of the nature You have created her with.
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayraha wa khayra ma jabaltaha 'alayh, wa a'udhu bika min sharriha wa sharri ma jabaltaha 'alayh.

arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنَ الصَّالِحِينَ
translation: My Lord, grant me from among the righteous.
transliteration: Rabbi hab li minas-salihin.

arabic: آيِبُونَ تَائِبُونَ عَابِدُونَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ
translation: Returning, repentant, worshipping, and praising our Lord.
transliteration: A'ibuna ta'ibuna 'abiduna li Rabbina hamidun.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ وَعَافِهِ وَاعْفُ عَنْهُ
translation: O Allah, forgive him and have mercy upon him. Grant him safety and pardon him.
transliteration: Allahummaghfir lahu warhamhu wa 'afihi wa'fu 'anh.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ بَدَأً خَيْرًا وَعَوْنًا لِي عَلَىٰ طَاعَتِكَ
translation: O Allah, make this a good beginning and an aid for me in obeying You.
transliteration: Allahummaj-'alhu bada'an khayran wa 'awnan li 'ala ta'atik.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ خِرْ لِي وَاخْتَرْ لِي
translation: O Allah, choose for me and select for me.
transliteration: Allahumma khir li wakhtar li.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow.
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَذِكْرًا خَاشِعًا
translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge and humble remembrance.
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an wa dhikran khashi'an.
